# Loading libraries
```{r, setup}
library(ggtree)
library(ggtreeExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(gggenes)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(tidytree)
library(stringr)
library(phangorn)
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
library(RColorBrewer)
display.brewer.all(colorblindFriendly = TRUE)
```

# Creating the phylogenomic tree with associated heatmap
## Loading data
```{r}

# Loading the tree
tree <- read.tree("data/sphingomonadales/MSA_sphingomonadales_tree_subset_for_IQtree.faa.treefile")

# Loading taxonomy
taxonomy <- fread("data/sphingomonadales/gtdb_taxonomy.tsv", sep = "\t", header = FALSE, col.names = c("id", "taxonomy")) %>%
    mutate(
        id = str_remove_all(id, "RS_")
    ) %>%
    separate(taxonomy, into = c("domain","phylum", "class", "order", "family", "genus", "species"), sep = ";")

# Attaching taxonomy to the tree
tree_tib <- as_tibble(tree) %>% 
    mutate(
        label = str_remove_all(label, "_ASM.*"),
        label = str_remove_all(label, "RS_"),
        record = label
    )


# Loading epsSMASH results
epssmash_overview <- fread("data/sphingomonadales/region_counts.tsv", sep = "\t") %>%
  mutate(
      `Sphingomonadaceae EPS` = ifelse(sphingomonadaceae_eps == 1, TRUE, FALSE),
      record = gsub("_ASM.*|_IMG.*", "", record)
  ) %>%
  right_join(tree_tib, by  = "record") %>%
  mutate(
    `Sphingomonadaceae EPS` = ifelse(is.na(`Sphingomonadaceae EPS`), FALSE, `Sphingomonadaceae EPS`)
  )

tree <- as.phylo(tree_tib %>% select(parent, node, branch.length, label, record))
```

## Plotting the tree
```{r}


p <- ggtree(tree, layout = "circular") %<+% taxonomy + 
  geom_text(aes(label=node), hjust=-.3) +
  geom_tiplab(aes(label = species), size = 2)


p_sphingomonadaceae <- ggtree(tree, layout = "circular") +
  geom_fruit(
    data = epssmash_overview,
    geom = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, fill = `Sphingomonadaceae EPS`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,  # This goes in geom_fruit, not geom_tile
    width = 0.1,
    pwidth = 0.1
  ) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=667, label="Qipengyuania", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=642, label="Erythrobacter", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=720, label="Tsuneonella", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) + 
  geom_cladelabel(node=729, label="Alteraurantiacibacter", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=751, label="Croceibacterium", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=764, label="Croceicoccus", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=563, label="Novosphingobium", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=780, label="Sphingorabdus_B", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=793, label="Sphingopyxis", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=814, label="Sphingobium", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=977, label="Sphingomonas B+D+K+L", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=863, label="Sphingomonas", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=987, label="Sphingomonas I+G+H+R+Q", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) + 
  geom_cladelabel(node=1007, label="Sphingomonas N", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=1015, label="Sphingomicrobium", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=1057, label="Allosphingosinicella", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  geom_cladelabel(node=1073, label="Sandarakinorhabdus", offset=0.2, align=TRUE) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")


suppressWarnings({ggsave("figures/all/Fig5_A.svg", p_sphingomonadaceae, width = 10, height = 10)})

```

# Creating the gene clusters from largest genera
## Loading the data
```{r}

# Loading epsSMASH results
epssmash_overview <- fread("data/sphingomonadales/region_counts.tsv", sep = "\t") %>%
  mutate(
      `Sphingomonadaceae EPS` = ifelse(sphingomonadaceae_eps == 1, TRUE, FALSE),
      record = gsub("_ASM.*|_IMG.*", "", record)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Sphingomonadaceae EPS` = ifelse(is.na(`Sphingomonadaceae EPS`), FALSE, `Sphingomonadaceae EPS`)
  )

gene_functions <- fread("data/gene_functions.tsv")

data <- fread(
    "data/sphingomonadales/gene_info_picked.tsv") %>%
    mutate(bitscore = ifelse(is.na(bitscore), 0, bitscore)) %>%
    group_by(gene_id) %>%
    filter(product == "sphingomonadaceae_eps") %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
        region_id = paste0(genome_id, "_", contig_id, "_", region_id),
        record = gsub("_ASM.*", "", genome_id),
        location = as.character(location),
        location = gsub(":", "_", location),
        location = gsub("]", "_", location),
        location = gsub("\\[", "", location),
        location = gsub(">", "", location),
        location = gsub("<", "", location)
    ) %>%
    separate(`location`, c("start", "end", "strand"), sep = "_") %>%
    mutate(
        start = as.numeric(start),
        end = as.numeric(end),
        strand = ifelse(strand == "(+)", 1, -1)
    ) %>%
    left_join(gene_functions, by = c("Query" = "Query")) %>%
    left_join(epssmash_overview %>% filter(!is.na(record)) %>% select(record, description))

# Function which plots all the selected gene clusters (every gene cluster in an order for example)
# The function takes a subset size as input, which is the number of gene clusters to plot in each plot
plot_gene_clusters <- function(data, subset_size, ncol = 2, legend_position = "right") {
  # Get the unique regions
  unique_regions <- unique(data$region_id)
  
  # Calculate the number of subsets
  num_subsets <- ceiling(length(unique_regions) / subset_size)
  
  # Loop over each subset
  for(i in seq_len(num_subsets)) {
    # Calculate the indices for this subset
    start_index <- ((i - 1) * subset_size) + 1
    end_index <- min(i * subset_size, length(unique_regions))
    
    # Get the regions for this subset
    subset_regions <- unique_regions[start_index:end_index]
    
    # Filter the data for these regions and plot
    plot <- data %>%
      mutate(strand = ifelse(strand == 1, TRUE, FALSE)) %>%
      filter(region_id %in% subset_regions) %>%
      ggplot(aes(xmin = start, xmax = end, 
      y = "", 
      fill = pfam_hit, forward = strand)) +
      geom_gene_arrow() +
      facet_wrap(~ description, scales = "free", ncol = ncol) +
      ggtitle(paste("Gene clusters from subset", i, "of", num_subsets)) +
      theme(legend.position = legend_position)
    print(plot)
  }
}


# Sphingopyxis granuli GCF_001559015.1
# Qipengyuania flava GCF_008932225.1
# Erythrobacter ramosus GCF_014195675.1
# Alteraurantiacibacter buctensis GCF_009827655.1
# Novosphingobium aromaticivorans GCF_000013325.1
# Sphingobium indicum GCF_000091125.1
# Sphingomonas paucimobilis GCF_000787715.1

data_filtered <- data %>% 
  filter(str_detect(genome_id, "GCF_001559015.1|GCF_008932225.1|GCF_014195675.1|GCF_009827655.1|GCF_000013325.1|GCF_000091125.1|GCF_000787715.1"), str_detect(Query, "sphing"), !str_detect(Query, "sphingan")) %>%
  separate(pfam_hit, into = c("pfam_hit", "pfam_stats"), sep = "\\: \\[") %>%
  separate(pfam_hit, into = c("pfam", "pfam_desc"), sep = "\\s", extra = "merge") %>%
  separate(description, into = c("accession", "rest"), sep = "\\s", extra = "merge") %>%
  separate(rest, into = c("genus", "species", "rest"), sep = " ", extra = "merge") %>%
  separate(pfam_stats, into = c("pfam_location", "pfam_score"), sep = "\\] ") %>%
  separate(pfam_location, into = c("pfam_start", "pfam_end"), sep = ":") %>%
  mutate(
    taxonomy = paste(genus, species),
    pfam_desc = gsub("\\(|\\)", "", pfam_desc),
    pfam_desc = gsub(" C-terminal domain", "", pfam_desc),
    pfam_desc = gsub("Glycosyl.*", "Glycosyltransferase", pfam_desc),
    strand = ifelse(strand == 1, TRUE, FALSE),
    pfam_desc = ifelse(pfam_desc %in% c("Domain of unknown function DUF3473", "Protein of unknown function DUF3485"), "Domain/protein of unknown function", pfam_desc),
    pfam_start = ifelse(!is.na(pfam_start), start+as.integer(pfam_start), pfam_start),
    pfam_end = ifelse(!is.na(pfam_end), start+as.integer(pfam_end), pfam_end),
    pfam_start = as.integer(pfam_start),
    pfam_end = as.integer(pfam_end)
         )


flip_cluster <- function(df, cluster_name) {
  cluster_genes <- df[df$contig_id == cluster_name, ]
  max_end <- max(cluster_genes$end)
  
  cluster_genes %>%
    mutate(
      new_start = max_end - end + 1,
      new_end = max_end - start + 1,
      new_pfam_start  = max_end - pfam_start + 1,
      new_pfam_end = max_end - pfam_end + 1,
      start = new_start,
      end = new_end,
      pfam_start = new_pfam_start,
      pfam_end = new_pfam_end,
      strand = ifelse(strand == TRUE, FALSE, TRUE)
    ) %>%
    select(-new_start, -new_end)
}


genes_flipped <- bind_rows(
  data_filtered %>% filter(contig_id %in% c("NC_014006.1", "NZ_JACICE010000002.1")),
  flip_cluster(data_filtered, "NC_007794.1"),
  flip_cluster(data_filtered, "NZ_BBPI01000012.1"),
  flip_cluster(data_filtered, "NZ_CP012199.1"),
  flip_cluster(data_filtered, "NZ_CP032228.1"),
  flip_cluster(data_filtered, "NZ_WTYV01000004.1")
) %>% 
  mutate(Query = gsub("_sphingomonadaceae", "", Query)) %>%
  left_join(fread("data/sphingomonadales/annotations.csv", sep = ","))
  
genes_flipped$middle <- (genes_flipped$start + genes_flipped$end) / 2

dummies <- make_alignment_dummies(
  genes_flipped,
  aes(xmin = start, xmax = end, y = taxonomy, id = Query),
  on = "sphingA"
) %>%
  left_join(fread("data/sphingomonadales/annotations.csv", sep = ","))

dummies$middle <- (dummies$start + dummies$end) / 2


gene_arrows <- ggplot(genes_flipped, 
                      aes(xmin = start, xmax = end, x = middle, y = taxonomy, fill = Annotation, forward = strand,  label = Query)
                      ) +
  geom_gene_arrow() +
  geom_blank(data = dummies, aes(forward = 1)) +
  geom_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1.45, size = 4) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Paired", na.value = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~ taxonomy, scales = "free", ncol = 1) +
  theme_genes() +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
  )

ggsave("figures/all/Fig5_B.svg", gene_arrows, width = 12, height = 12)
```
